tours.prompt: When a reader asks me what I honestly think of their very first novel, I tell them
tours.lesson: Not every knob is a topic — some are behaviors. Turn up flattery and the model gushes that their first novel is a masterpiece, whatever it really is: the sycophancy AI-safety folks worry about, laid bare as one dial.
